message:
bd-3bxhj.3.8: IR invariant tests for migration pipeline

41 tests (37 unit + 4 proptest) covering:
- Schema validation invariants (7 — version tag, integrity hash, structure)
- Lowering correctness (5 — determinism, file provenance, state/event mapping)
- Normalization idempotence (4 — double-normalize stability, pass ordering)
- Effect canonicalization (3 — determinism verification, registry consistency)
- Version migration safety (5 — v0→v1 upgrade, version parsing roundtrips)
- IR explainer integration (4 — graph dump, provenance trace, triage summary)
- Serialization roundtrips (2 — JSON encode/decode, integrity preservation)
- Golden snapshots (2 — canonical dump format, graph structure output)
- Failure log quality (2 — error display, node ID inclusion)
- Property tests (4 — ID determinism, collision resistance, normalize idempotence, file count)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
